understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to finish each level by positioning the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' was occupied at the same time, which triggers a WIN for the level and ultimately completes the game run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions were primarily CLICK-based: clicking a target coordinate attempted to move the currently selected piece to that location; if the destination was invalid due to walls/obstacles, out-of-bounds, or occupancy/other constraints, the piece would not move (reported as blocked/no effect). When multiple pieces existed, selection could be changed by clicking the other piece’s position (or otherwise interacting with it), and the step budget limited how many move attempts could be made per level.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to finish each level by positioning the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' was occupied at the same time, which triggers a WIN for the level and ultimately completes the game run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions were primarily CLICK-based: clicking a target coordinate attempted to move the currently selected piece to that location; if the destination was invalid due to walls/obstacles, out-of-bounds, or occupancy/other constraints, the piece would not move (reported as blocked/no effect). When multiple pieces existed, selection could be changed by clicking the other piece’s position (or otherwise interacting with it), and the step budget limited how many move attempts could be made per level.
